title: BlahMod
description: BlahMod is a goofy mod that add some weird items, behaviors, and entities.
body:
# **BlahMod**

BlahMod is a goofy mod that add some weird items, behaviors, and entities.
If you find any bugs, please tell me.

## **Enitites:**

- What
- Hit Me
- Blah Villager
- Fred

## **Items:**

- Lightning Bolt
- Fred Egg
- Blah (Ore)
- Blahwood (Wood Type)

## **Structures:**

- Blah Tree
- Ruined Blah Portal

## **Villager Professions:**

- Blah Villager

## **Biomes:**

- Blah Biome
- Dead Biome
- Extreme Jungle

## **Dimensions:**

- Blah Dimension

(You can use this mod in your modpacks, just make sure people know it is in the modpack)

**ON SERVERS: DO NOT ENABLE HITMEACTION GAMERULE OR ANGRYFORGLES (ENABLED BY DEFAULT) GAMERULE!**

**WARNING: Multiplayer may be buggy due to limited ability for testing (feel free to see if there are any issues).**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**WARNING: Hitting the hit me will ban you from the world. This is shut off by default in the game rules. Mod can also crash your game (Part of AngryForgles gamerule).**

</details>
